stepBody: Sara applies PCA to each of the four datasets above. Which of the datasets have a PC2 vector of approximately [1/sqrt(2), 1/sqrt(2)]**T.
choices: Dataset A: False, Dataset B: False, Dataset C: True, Dataset D: True
